creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgj         2010-01-12 22:03:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/hs-scgi          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This Haskell library lets you write SCGI programs. This package reuses
  the cgi package API, making it very easy to port CGI programs to SCGI.
  
  WWW: http://github.com/esessoms/scgi
  
  PR:             ports/142499
  Submitted by:   Jacula Modyun <jacula(at)gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2523    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +77 -0     ports/www/hs-scgi/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/hs-scgi/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/www/hs-scgi/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/www/hs-scgi/pkg-plist (new)
